author: y4rr
content: Cross() rewritten to compute the cross product along any axis via row-major stride iteration over the non-axis dimensions; signature unchanged. full_meta() rewritten to record the fill value as Option<T> in the Meta storage variant; meta_filled()/meta_fill_value() added on TensorStorage + Tensor so the value is observable as metadata even though meta tensors still allocate no element data. Renamed _value → value (internal param rename only, public signature unchanged). 4 new tests: cross_dim_zero_vs_dim_last_differ (the discriminating fixture, verified vs torch.linalg.cross), cross_dim_out_of_range_errors, cross_dim_size_must_be_three, full_meta_records_value_and_discriminates_by_fill. ferrotorch-core lib 1302/1302 pass; clippy -D warnings clean.
